chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكَةُ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوَالِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 119 – The owned slave girl gets married without the permission of her master

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ الْبَزَنْطِيِّ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْأَمَةِ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ أَهْلِهَا قَالَ يَحْرُمُ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهَا وَ هُوَ الزِّنَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr Al Bazanty, from Dawood Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Al Abbas who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl who gets married without a permission of her owner. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is Prohibited unto her and it would be the adultery’.
